summary: Comprehensive testing of new Activity Detail Page navigation and Admin Image Upload features completed successfully. All backend APIs (20/20) and frontend functionality working perfectly. New features: activity detail pages with full content display, professional drag-drop + URL image uploader in admin panel.
passed_tests: Backend API: GET /api/activities/{id} returns single activity with all required fields
Backend API: GET /api/activities/non-existent-id returns 404 error as expected
Backend API: POST /api/upload accepts file upload with admin authentication
Backend API: Static file serving at /api/uploads/{filename} works with correct content-type
Frontend: Activity cards on homepage are clickable and navigate to detail pages
Frontend: Activity cards on /activities page are clickable with 'বিস্তারিত পড়ুন' text
Frontend: Activity detail page displays title, category, date, content, image, breadcrumbs
Frontend: Activity detail page shows 'আরো কার্যক্রম' (related posts) section with 3 items
Frontend: Back to activities button works correctly from detail page
Frontend: Share button present and functional on detail pages
Frontend: Breadcrumb navigation (Home > Activities > Post title) works
Frontend: Non-existent activity ID shows 'পোস্ট পাওয়া যায়নি' Bengali error message
Frontend: Admin login works with admin/admin123 credentials
Frontend: Admin dashboard new post button opens activity creation form
Frontend: Image upload dropzone with Bengali text 'ছবি আপলোড করুন' found
Frontend: Switch between file upload and URL input mode works
Frontend: URL image input accepts external image URLs and shows preview
Frontend: Admin form creates posts successfully with image URL integration
Frontend: Image uploader preview shows uploaded/URL images correctly
Frontend: All form fields (title, category, date, content, publish status) work
